title: K-200 GCS Environmental Test Report
text:
# K-200 GCS Environmental Test Report

Document number: MD-DOC-447-E. Revision: E. Type: risk-register. Author: Priya Nair. Created: 2023-04-01. Last modified: 2023-09-03. Status: Released.

This document defines the requirements, interfaces, and verification approach for the GCS subsystem of the Kestrel K-200. Referenced parts: P-1112.
